name: Solitaire 2048
description: Solitaire 2048 is a free online card and merge game for boys played on PuzzleGame.The game is easy to learn and quite addictive. Drag and drop the same number card to merge and maximize your score. Get 2048 and receive the score bonus. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Test your brain, relax and enjoy the game.
tags: Android, Boy, Brain, Card, Educational, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Matching, Math, Number, Online, Puzzle
